title: Piglet Extension Protocol v4
description: JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol for piglet external extensions. Transport: newline-delimited JSON over FD 3 (host→ext) and FD 4 (ext→host), with stdin/stdout fallback.

Request.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 request. Has both method and id.

Response.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 response. Has id and either result or error.

Notification.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 notification. Has method but no id. No response expected.

ContentBlock.description: A content block in a tool result. Type 'text' uses the text field; type 'image' uses data (base64) and mime.

mime.description: MIME type for image blocks, e.g. image/png.

ActionResult.description: A JSON-serializable action returned by extensions. The host converts it to the appropriate ext.Action type.

ChatMessage.description: A single message in a chat request.

CompactMessage.description: A conversation message serialized for compaction. The data field is raw JSON for the underlying message type.

data.description: Raw JSON for the underlying message.

HostToolInfo.description: Describes a single host-registered tool available to extensions.

parameters.description: JSON Schema describing the tool's input parameters.

HostTokenUsage.description: Token consumption for a single LLM call.

WireSessionInfo.description: Wire representation of a session summary.

WireExtInfo.description: Wire representation of a loaded extension's metadata.

InitializeParams.description: Sent by the host after spawning the extension process.

cwd.description: Working directory of the host process.

InitializeResult.description: Extension's response to initialize, identifying itself to the host.

ShutdownParams.description: Asks the extension to shut down gracefully. No fields.

CancelParams.description: Tells the extension to abort the request with the given ID.

RegisterToolParams.description: Registers a tool the LLM can call. Sent as a notification from extension to host.

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input parameters.

promptHint.description: Optional additional text injected into the system prompt to guide tool use.

RegisterCommandParams.description: Registers a slash command. Sent as a notification from extension to host.

RegisterPromptSectionParams.description: Adds a named section to the system prompt. Sent as a notification from extension to host.

order.description: Insertion order. Lower values appear earlier. Default 0.

RegisterInterceptorParams.description: Registers a before/after tool interceptor. Sent as a notification from extension to host.

priority.description: Execution order. Higher values run first. Default 0.

RegisterEventHandlerParams.description: Registers an agent lifecycle event handler. Sent as a notification from extension to host.

priority.description: Execution order among handlers for the same event.

events.description: Event names to subscribe to (e.g. 'EventTurnEnd'). Null or omitted means all events.

RegisterShortcutParams.description: Registers a keyboard shortcut. Sent as a notification from extension to host.

RegisterMessageHookParams.description: Registers a pre-message hook that fires before each user message reaches the LLM. Sent as a notification from extension to host.

priority.description: Execution order. Higher values run first.

RegisterCompactorParams.description: Registers a conversation compactor. Only one compactor can be active. Sent as a notification from extension to host.

threshold.description: Message count at which compaction triggers. 0 = use config default.

RegisterProviderParams.description: Registers a streaming LLM provider. Sent as a notification from extension to host during handshake.

ProviderStreamParams.description: Sent by the host to the extension to initiate a streaming LLM call.

ProviderStreamResult.description: Extension's response to a provider/stream request.

ProviderDeltaParams.description: Sent by the extension to the host as an incremental streaming event during a provider/stream call.

ProviderToolCall.description: A tool call emitted during provider streaming.

ToolExecuteParams.description: Sent by the host when the LLM calls a tool owned by this extension.

ToolExecuteResult.description: Extension's response to a tool execution request.

isError.description: True if the tool returned an error result.

CommandExecuteParams.description: Sent by the host when the user invokes a slash command owned by this extension.

CommandExecuteResult.description: Extension's response to a command execution. Currently empty; errors use the RPC error field.

InterceptorBeforeParams.description: Sent by the host just before a tool executes.

InterceptorBeforeResult.description: Extension's response from an interceptor/before call.

allow.description: If false the tool execution is blocked.

args.description: Optionally modified args to pass to the tool.

InterceptorAfterParams.description: Sent by the host after a tool has executed.

details.description: Tool result details; schema depends on the tool.

InterceptorAfterResult.description: Extension's response from an interceptor/after call.

details.description: Optionally modified details to pass back.

EventDispatchParams.description: Sent by the host when an agent lifecycle event occurs.

data.description: Event payload as raw JSON. Schema varies by event type.

EventDispatchResult.description: Extension's response to an event dispatch.

ShortcutHandleParams.description: Sent by the host when the user presses a registered shortcut.

key.description: The shortcut key that was pressed, e.g. 'ctrl+g'.

ShortcutHandleResult.description: Extension's response to a shortcut press.

MessageHookParams.description: Sent by the host before a user message reaches the LLM.

MessageHookResult.description: Extension's response to a message hook invocation.

injection.description: Ephemeral context to inject into this turn only. Empty string = no injection.

CompactExecuteParams.description: Sent by the host when the token threshold is exceeded and compaction is needed.

CompactExecuteResult.description: Extension's response containing the compacted message history.

NotifyParams.description: Sends a toast/status notification to the TUI. Extension → host notification.

LogParams.description: Writes a log line to the host's log file. Extension → host notification.

ShowMessageParams.description: Displays a message in the conversation panel. Extension → host notification.

SendMessageParams.description: Submits a message as if the user typed it, starting a new agent turn. Extension → host notification.

SteerParams.description: Interrupts the current turn and injects a steering message. Extension → host notification.

HostListToolsParams.description: Extension → host request to list available host tools.

filter.description: 'all' returns every registered tool. 'background_safe' returns only tools safe for background agents. Default: 'all'.

HostExecuteToolParams.description: Extension → host request to execute a host-registered tool.

HostConfigGetParams.description: Extension → host request to read host configuration values.

HostConfigReadExtParams.description: Extension → host request to read an extension's markdown config file.

HostAuthGetKeyParams.description: Extension → host request to retrieve an API key for a provider.

HostChatParams.description: Extension → host request to make a single-turn LLM call.

HostAgentRunParams.description: Extension → host request to run a full agent loop in an isolated context.

HostConversationMessagesResult.description: Host's response to host/conversationMessages — raw JSONL message array.

messages.description: Raw JSON array of conversation messages.

HostLoadSessionParams.description: Extension → host request to load a session by file path.

HostSetSessionTitleParams.description: Extension → host request to set the current session's title.

HostRunBackgroundParams.description: Extension → host request to start a background agent.

HostExtInfosResult.description: Host's response to host/extInfos — metadata for all loaded extensions.

HostExtensionsDirResult.description: Host's response to host/extensionsDir — path to the extensions directory.

HostUndoSnapshotsResult.description: Host's response to host/undoSnapshots — file paths with snapshot sizes.

snapshots.description: Map of file path → snapshot size in bytes.

HostUndoRestoreParams.description: Extension → host request to restore a file from its undo snapshot.

Methods.description: All method name constants defined in the protocol.

MethodTable.description: Reference table: method → direction, kind (request|notification), params type, result type.

initialize.description: Host→Ext request. Params: InitializeParams. Result: InitializeResult.

shutdown.description: Host→Ext request. Params: ShutdownParams (empty). Result: empty.

tool/execute.description: Host→Ext request. Params: ToolExecuteParams. Result: ToolExecuteResult.

command/execute.description: Host→Ext request. Params: CommandExecuteParams. Result: CommandExecuteResult (empty).

interceptor/before.description: Host→Ext request. Params: InterceptorBeforeParams. Result: InterceptorBeforeResult.

interceptor/after.description: Host→Ext request. Params: InterceptorAfterParams. Result: InterceptorAfterResult.

event/dispatch.description: Host→Ext request. Params: EventDispatchParams. Result: EventDispatchResult.

shortcut/handle.description: Host→Ext request. Params: ShortcutHandleParams. Result: ShortcutHandleResult.

messageHook/onMessage.description: Host→Ext request. Params: MessageHookParams. Result: MessageHookResult.

compact/execute.description: Host→Ext request. Params: CompactExecuteParams. Result: CompactExecuteResult.

register/provider.description: Ext→Host notification. Params: RegisterProviderParams. Handshake: declares provider capability.

provider/stream.description: Host→Ext request. Params: ProviderStreamParams. Result: ProviderStreamResult.

provider/delta.description: Ext→Host notification. Params: ProviderDeltaParams. Incremental streaming event.

host/listTools.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostListToolsParams. Result: HostListToolsResult.

host/executeTool.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostExecuteToolParams. Result: HostExecuteToolResult.

host/config.get.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostConfigGetParams. Result: HostConfigGetResult.

host/config.readExtension.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostConfigReadExtParams. Result: HostConfigReadExtResult.

host/auth.getKey.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostAuthGetKeyParams. Result: HostAuthGetKeyResult.

host/chat.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostChatParams. Result: HostChatResult.

host/agent.run.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostAgentRunParams. Result: HostAgentRunResult.

host/conversationMessages.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: HostConversationMessagesResult.

host/sessions.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: HostSessionsResult.

host/loadSession.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostLoadSessionParams. Result: empty.

host/forkSession.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: HostForkSessionResult.

host/setSessionTitle.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostSetSessionTitleParams. Result: empty.

host/syncModels.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: HostSyncModelsResult.

host/runBackground.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostRunBackgroundParams. Result: empty.

host/cancelBackground.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: empty.

host/isBackgroundRunning.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: HostIsBackgroundRunningResult.

host/extInfos.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: HostExtInfosResult.

host/extensionsDir.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: HostExtensionsDirResult.

host/undoSnapshots.description: Ext→Host request. Params: empty. Result: HostUndoSnapshotsResult.

host/undoRestore.description: Ext→Host request. Params: HostUndoRestoreParams. Result: empty.
